abstract: High-conversion landing page patterns with CRO psychology, Tailwind code, and copy frameworks. Seven section types: Hero (5 variants), Social Proof, Feature Grid (3 variants), Pricing (3-tier anchor), Testimonials, FAQ (objection-handling), Final CTA. Includes eye-tracking patterns (F/Z/Gutenberg), Hick's law (choice reduction), anchoring effect, social proof hierarchy, loss aversion, and A/B test hooks. 30+ production-ready component examples with conversion benchmarks.
